competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot Marketing Copy & Feature Descriptions

## Agents & Autonomous Execution
"Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously in the background."

GitHub positions agents as task-handling systems capable of operating independently while developers focus on other priorities. The platform supports multiple AI providers for agent functionality.

## Copilot Spaces
"Turn Copilot into a project expert" through shared knowledge repositories. This feature enables teams to establish consistent reference materials by combining organizational documentation and codebase information.

## Context & Session Management
The system examines code in user editors, focusing on surrounding lines while incorporating information from open files and repository URLs to inform suggestions. For chat functionality, the system builds contextual prompts combining user input with active document code, selections, and workspace details.

GitHub retains prompts and suggestions for 28 days across most access methods, though IDE-based chat and completions don't retain this data. Session continuity depends on thread history for effective responses.

## Background Task Execution
The platform emphasizes autonomous workflow execution, allowing developers to "watch it plan, build, and execute complex workflows powered by your GitHub context" through the Copilot CLI.

## Customization & Enterprise Controls
"Manage agent usage with enterprise-grade controls" including detailed audit logs and centralized governance from a single control plane.

## Agents & Autonomous Execution
"Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex

changes.description: 页面新增 'Context & Session Management' 章节，明确阐述 session 连续性依赖线程历史，并披露 28 天 prompt 数据保留策略
changes.evidence: 「Session continuity depends on thread history for effective responses. GitHub retains prompts and suggestions for 28 days across most access methods」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Copilot 的 session 模型是线程历史驱动，与 meee2 session 同构协议有本质差异——可作为产品差异化论据

changes.description: 新增 'Enterprise Controls' 板块，强调 agent 使用的企业级管控和审计日志，向企业市场延伸
changes.evidence: 「Manage agent usage with enterprise-grade controls including detailed audit logs and centralized governance from a single control plane」

key_findings: Copilot 将 session 连续性定义为「线程历史驱动」，与 meee2 session 协议存在本质差异，可作为差异化论据
企业级 agent 管控能力（audit logs + centralized governance）新增，Copilot 加速向组织维度扩张
